basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT)
basic_details.short_information: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Young Professional-I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC and 10 years for PH candidates as per govt. rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Agricultural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Agriculture, Textile Technology, Textile Chemistry, Agricultural Sciences, Physics, or Diploma in relevant agricultural sciences/engineering/technology.
qualification.details: For Post 1: Graduation with at least 60% marks in Agricultural Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Chemistry/ Chemical Engineering/Agriculture or diploma holders in relevant agricultural sciences/engineering/technology. Desirable: Knowledge of handling of equipment's related to chemical analysis of agro-biomass samples, sample collection, data handling and analysis. For Post 2: Graduate Degree holders in Textile Technology/Textile Chemistry/Agricultural Sciences/Agricultural Engineering/ Physics/ Chemistry or diploma holders in relevant agricultural sciences/engineering/technology. Desirable: Experience in Laboratory work for testing of cotton fibre, yarn and fabric parameters like count, strength, Elongation, Twist, Pilling, Abrasion, EPI, PPI, GSM etc, as per National & International Standard Method. Handling of Testing Instruments in the laboratory. Working knowledge of computers/internet. For Post 3: Graduate Degree holders in Textile Technology/Textile Chemistry/ Agricultural Sciences/Mechanical Engineering. Desirable: Working knowledge of computers/internet and Handling of Knitting Machines & spinning.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional-I posts at ICAR CIRCOT?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Young Professional-I posts at ICAR CIRCOT is 19-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional-I position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: The essential qualifications include Graduation in various engineering and science fields like Agricultural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemistry, Agriculture, Textile Technology, and related diplomas. Specific requirements vary by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional-I posts will be based on an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is ICAR CIRCOT located?
faq.answer: ICAR CIRCOT is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400019.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available for the Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per government rules: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for PH candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Young Professional-I posts in this recruitment drive by ICAR CIRCOT.
